steps.title: Convert the percent
steps.content:
Write $8\%$ as a decimal so it can be multiplied by the total number of tiles:
$$8\%=\frac{8}{100}=0.08$$

steps.title: Multiply by the total
steps.content:
Find $8\%$ of $425$ by multiplying the decimal by the total:
$$0.08(425)=34$$
The answer is 34.
